page: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-32-highlssd is a memory-optimized server instance featuring 32 vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8481C processor running at 2.7 GHz. The system is equipped with 256 GB of RAM, providing an 8 GB per vCPU ratio, and includes 12,884 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. The x86_64 architecture supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for tile and INT8 operations.

Benchmark results show strong multi-threaded performance, with bzip3 decompression reaching 171.82 GB/sec and Geekbench image processing scoring 14,126.0. The processor's AMX capabilities contribute to strong LLM inference prompt processing speeds of 2,433.87 tokens/sec on small 135M models and 169.04 tokens/sec on medium 7B models. Memory bandwidth tests show 2,175.06 GB/sec for cached small-block reads and 115.28 GB/sec for large-block uncached reads.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the server bundles a massive 12.8 TB NVMe SSD storage capacity directly with a high-density memory configuration, reducing the need for external block storage attachments. However, the instance lacks dedicated GPU hardware, which limits its utility for heavy model training, and it includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This configuration is optimized for memory-intensive databases, large-scale data processing, and local-storage-heavy workloads.
description: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-32-highlssd is a memory-optimized server configured with 32 vCPUs and 256 GB of RAM, powered by a 2.7 GHz Intel Xeon 8481C processor. It features 12,884 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, offering high local storage density. The x86_64 architecture supports Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) and AVX-512, which drive strong performance in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and small-to-medium LLM inference prompt processing. While the server lacks a dedicated GPU and complimentary public IPv4 addresses, its high memory-to-core ratio and massive local storage make it highly efficient for database operations, memory-intensive applications, and data processing tasks.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-32-highlssd features 32 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 12,884 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, delivering strong multi-threaded decompression and memory-intensive database performance.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-32-highlssd is a memory-optimized server with 32 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 12.8 TB of local NVMe SSD storage.
tagline: A memory-optimized server featuring 256 GB RAM, Intel Xeon AMX instructions, and 12.8 TB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8481C processor with 32 vCPUs and 256 GB RAM
12,884 GB of integrated local NVMe SSD storage
Intel AMX support for accelerated matrix and vector operations
Strong multi-threaded decompression and image processing benchmarks
Designed for memory-intensive databases and large-scale data processing
